feature.title: Outcome Trophy Room
feature.purpose: Turn completed outcomes into a reusable achievement wall so operators can see what has been unlocked and jump from a trophy into the source lane trail.

research.title: UI Patterns: Collectible Achievements
research.takeaway: Achievement systems benefit from attractive trophy-like visual objects that users can browse and display.

research.title: Trophy: Designing Achievements for Optimal User Engagement
research.takeaway: Strong achievement systems guide progression and recognize meaningful milestones rather than random activity.

research.title: GetStream: Activity Feed Ideas
research.takeaway: Activity feeds can increase engagement when they organize ongoing events into clear, return-worthy surfaces.

research.title: Grid Sage Games: Achievements UI Design and Implementation
research.takeaway: A standalone game-like system needs its own achievement interface for browsing and interaction.

interactions: Trophy Room reads completed outcome events from snapshot.missionFeed.items.
Each trophy uses lane art, lane colors, tier, reward text, summary, date, and click-through data.
Lane Trophy Tracks rank the most outcome-rich lanes using snapshot.lanes[].counts.outcomes.
Clicking a trophy opens the source lane Trail view.
The implementation is static, data-driven, and portable to other agent-company repos.

nextIdeas: Add filters for trophy tier and lane realm.
Generate dedicated trophy icon sheets for outcome categories.
Add unlock animation when new outcomes appear after snapshot refresh.
Let each lane define its own trophy track milestones.
